name: Chalice Mining Limited
summary: Chalice Mining Limited operates as a mineral exploration company. The company explores for gold, copper, cobalt, palladium, and nickel deposits. Its flagship properties include the Julimar Nickel-Copper- platinum group element project that covers an area of approximately 2,000 square kilometers situated in Avon Region, Western Australia; and the Pyramid Hill gold project, which covers an area of approximately 5,000 square kilometers located in Bendigo Region, Victoria. The company was formerly known as Chalice Gold Mines Limited and changed its name to Chalice Mining Limited in December 2020. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
